name: Oatmeal Crunchies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in grated orange rind.
5. Sift together nutmeg, salt, baking powder, and flour into a separate bowl.
6. Gradually mix the sifted dry ingredients into the wet mixture with the juice, alternating between adding them to ensure even distribution.
7. Fold in the oatmeal cereal until fully incorporated.
8. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
9. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Yield approximately 5 dozen cookies.
